question: Identify the Chicago city department that consistently ranked in the top five for ordinance appropriations (with non-zero budget) and also had the highest average salary budget recommendations from 2019 to 2021. Who was the first head of that department? Return the person's name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: According to the 2019 Chicago Budget Ordinance Appropriations dataset, the top 5 departments by total ordinance amount were: 99 FINANCE GENERAL ($4,947,717,643.00), 57 CPD ($1,656,002,057.00), 85 AVIATION ($911,289,787.00), 59 CFD ($652,282,316.00), and 50 DFSS ($633,571,744.00).
1.subquestion: Which department numbers were in the top 5 by total ordinance appropriation in each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NUMBER; sum 2019 ORDINANCE (AMOUNT $); rank desc; take top 5.)

2.fact: According to the 2020 Chicago Budget Ordinance Appropriations dataset, the top 5 departments by total ordinance amount were: 99 FINANCE GENERAL ($5,914,554,145.00), 57 CPD ($1,762,078,349.00), 85 AVIATION ($871,219,092.00), 50 DFSS ($686,392,402.00), and 59 CFD ($674,228,297.00).
2.subquestion: Which department numbers were in the top 5 by total ordinance appropriation in each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NUMBER; sum 2020 ORDINANCE (AMOUNT $); rank desc; take top 5.)

3.fact: According to the 2021 Chicago Budget Ordinance Appropriations dataset, the top 5 departments by total ordinance amount were: 99 FINANCE GENERAL ($5,681,317,598.00), 57 CPD ($1,698,735,503.00), 85 CDA ($1,141,154,450.00), 50 DFSS ($780,489,814.00), and 84 CDOT ($770,356,074.00).
3.subquestion: Which department numbers were in the top 5 by total ordinance appropriation in each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NUMBER; sum 2021 ORDINANCE (AMOUNT $); rank desc; take top 5.)

4.fact: According to the 2019 Chicago Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 1 department numbers were: 57 ($1,293,487,079.00), 85 ($144,020,555.00), 50 ($42,342,535.00), and 99 ($0.00; no rows for that department code).
4.subquestion: For the department numbers (from hop 1), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 1 intersection {99, 57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

5.fact: According to the 2020 Chicago Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 1 department numbers were: 57 ($1,308,621,421.00), 85 ($159,362,510.00), 50 ($42,996,687.00), and 99 ($0.00; no rows for that department code).
5.subquestion: For the department numbers (from hop 1), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 1 intersection {99, 57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

6.fact: According to the 2021 Chicago Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 1 department numbers were: 57 ($1,277,019,448.00), 85 ($158,941,618.00), 50 ($43,046,519.00), and 99 ($0.00; no rows for that department code).
6.subquestion: For the department numbers (from hop 1), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 1 intersection {99, 57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

7.fact: According to the 2019 Chicago Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 2 department codes were: 57 (Chicago Police Department) $1,293,460,481.00; 85 (Chicago Department of Aviation) $144,015,863.00; 50 (Department of Family and Support Services) $42,342,535.00.
7.subquestion: For the department codes (from hop 2), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 2 list {57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

8.fact: According to the 2020 Chicago Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 2 department codes were: 57 (Chicago Police Department) $1,308,615,601.00; 85 (Chicago Department of Aviation) $159,389,114.00; 50 (Department of Family and Support Services) $42,996,687.00.
8.subquestion: For the department codes (from hop 2), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 2 list {57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

9.fact: According to the 2021 Chicago Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 2 department codes were: 57 (Chicago Police Department) $1,277,090,115.00; 85 (Chicago Department of Aviation) $158,946,654.00; 50 (Department of Family and Support Services) $43,048,415.00.
9.subquestion: For the department codes (from hop 2), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 2 list {57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

10.fact: Criminologist O. W. Wilson was brought on as Superintendent of Police, and served until 1967 when he retired. This position, in its current iteration, has existed as the head of the Chicago Police Department since 1960.
10.subquestion: Who was brought on as Superintendent of Police when the position (current iteration) was established as head of the department (from hop 3)?

Answer: Intersection across 2019-2021 -> {99, 57, 85, 50}

HOP 4 (d=1, Wikipedia Chicago Police Department - node 10):

Final answer: O. W. Wilson
